name: enhancement-hooks-pattern
description: Three enhancement hooks provide extension points: enhanceModels adds computed views to entities (e.g., AuthSession.isExpired), enhanceCollections adds custom queries to collections, enhanceRootStore adds domain actions with environment access via getEnv<IEnvironment>(self).
recommendation: Use enhanceModels for Team.effectivePermissions, Membership.isActive computed views. Use enhanceRootStore for resolvePermissions action that walks hierarchy.
